content.rendered:
Organized by RealTrips

Escape to the Andaman Islands, a tropical paradise of pristine beaches, crystal-clear waters, and lush green landscapes. This journey takes you through the capital city Port Blair, the serene Havelock Island, and the untouched beauty of Neil Island — a perfect getaway for nature lovers, beach enthusiasts, and adventure seekers.

Port Blair (3 Nights)
Start your island adventure in Port Blair, the gateway to the Andaman Islands. Visit the historic Cellular Jail, explore the serene Corbyns Cove Beach, and enjoy the tranquil waters. A visit to Chidiya Tapu will offer spectacular sunset views, while Ross Island takes you through the remnants of British colonial history.

Havelock Island (2 Nights)
Head to Havelock Island, famous for its white sandy beaches and crystal-clear waters. Relax at the beautiful Radhanagar Beach, rated one of Asia’s best beaches, and indulge in water activities like snorkeling, scuba diving, and kayaking. The serene surroundings make it the perfect spot for relaxation and adventure.

Neil Island (1 Night)
A short boat ride will take you to Neil Island, known for its untouched beaches and vibrant coral reefs. Spend a day in this tranquil haven, with its laid-back atmosphere perfect for a peaceful escape. Explore the pristine Laxmanpur Beach and Natural Bridge before heading back to Port Blair.

Port Blair…

description:
Explore Andaman: Port Blair (3N) – Havelock (2N) – Neil Island (1N)
Unwind in the turquoise beauty of the Andaman Islands with this delightful 6N/7D journey. Begin at Port Blair, where history meets charm with a visit to the iconic Cellular Jail, light & sound show, and nearby pristine beaches. Sail across to Havelock Island, home to the world-famous Radhanagar Beach, crystal-clear waters, and thrilling adventures like snorkeling and scuba diving at Elephant Beach. Continue to the serene Neil Island, a hidden gem known for its natural rock formations, unspoiled beaches, and laid-back vibes. End the trip back in Port Blair, cherishing the perfect mix of history, adventure, and tropical relaxation that makes the Andaman Islands a true paradise.

faqs.title: 1. What are the main highlights of this trip?
faqs.content: Port Blair: Cellular Jail & Light & Sound Show, Corbyn’s Cove Beach Havelock Island: Radhanagar Beach (Asia’s top beach), Elephant Beach (water sports) Neil Island: Natural Bridge, Bharatpur & Laxmanpur Beaches

faqs.title: 2. Are water sports included in the package?
faqs.content: No, but activities like scuba diving, snorkeling, sea walking & glass-bottom boat rides can be booked on the spot at extra cost.

faqs.title: 3. Do I need a passport or visa to visit Andaman?
faqs.content: No, Indian citizens don’t need a passport or visa. A government-issued photo ID is sufficient. Foreign nationals require a visa and Restricted Area Permit.

faqs.title: 4. How are inter-island transfers managed?
faqs.content: Transfers are arranged by ferries (Government or Private). Tickets are pre-booked to ensure smooth travel.
